calendar.matters: STATUS CONFERENCE RE: FINAL ADMINISTRATION OF THE CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT

STATUS CONFERENCE RE: FINAL ADMINISTRATION OF THE CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Continued To Jun-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
John Lofton, Esq. 510-779-2625 Aiman-Smith & Marcy P.C. for Plaintiff.
Eric Hill, Esq. 415-544-1037 Seyfarth Law for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received; the court announces a clarification; it is undisputed Plaintiff failed to follow the TR on 12/18 prior to that hearing; motion to amend the judgment not properly before the court.

ARGUED. Mr. Lofton informs the Court a proposed order was submitted at noon that day; TR contains strong language re: violating a court order; time of motion handled by co-counsel; will refile papers and proceed with the hearing in June. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Status Conference Re: Final Administration of the Class Action Settlement. The matter is Under Submission. The status Conference is CONTINUED TO JUNE 17, 2026, AT 9 AM IN THIS DEPARTMENT. The Court will adjust the language on continuous violations and looks forward to a properly noticed motion to amending judgment.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

STATUS CONFERENCE RE: FINAL ADMINISTRATION OF THE CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Continued To Jan-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

STATUS CONFERENCE RE: FINAL ADMINISTRATION OF THE CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT.

The Status of Settlement Hearing is continued to January 20, 2026 at 9:00am in this department.

Plaintiff shall file a memorandum (and appropriate declarations) identifying and discussing status of settlement and outstanding issues no later than 10 calendar days before the hearing, with courtesy copy delivered to the department within 24 hours of filing.

Plaintiff is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the above text and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org no later than 8:30 a.m. on December 19, 2025.

No proposed order received. Plaintiff failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)
